steps.title: Find the initial value
steps.content:
The experiment begins when $x=0$. Substitute $0$ into the equation for remaining distance.
$$y=420-136(0)=420$$

steps.title: Interpret the constant
steps.content: The value $420$ is the remaining distance at the start of the experiment, measured in meters. That is the rover's initial distance from its target. The answer is C.
